findings.issue: Technical product name `Bedrock` is left unbolded, while the resume otherwise bolds technical nouns outside Skills.
findings.fix: Change it to `**Bedrock**` or `**AWS Bedrock**` so technical emphasis is consistent across the page.

findings.issue: `Structured Problem Solver` is a generic cognition label and weakens the last Summary sentence on a quick scan.
findings.fix: Replace it with a higher-signal framing such as `**Systems judgment:**` or `**Pattern recognition:**` while keeping the body text.

findings.issue: The latest experience is framed entirely as percentage improvements, so HR cannot infer service scale or seniority from the first screen.
findings.fix: Add one concrete Tier 1 anchor in the strongest bullet, such as request volume, data volume, service count, latency/SLA, or team boundary, while keeping the existing deltas.

revision_priority: [SHOULD] Add one Tier 1 scope anchor to the TikTok internship section so the latest experience reads as backend-scale work, not only a set of percentage deltas.
[SHOULD] Replace the generic Summary header `Structured Problem Solver` with a stronger cognition frame such as `Systems judgment` or `Pattern recognition`.
[NICE] Bold `Bedrock` in the TikTok bullet so technical emphasis is consistent with the rest of the resume.
